title: Brachycorythis truncatolabellata
taxonomy: Brachycorythis truncatolabellata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. The genus Brachycorythis belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. This species is further categorized as a member of the tribe Orchideae and the subtribe Orchidinae. Brachycorythis truncatolabellata is native to tropical regions and is often found in woodland areas or grasslands. Its classification is based on its unique characteristics and morphological features.
